title: Bray's Better Leaf Litter
description: A different take on leaf litter!
body:
# Bray's BETTER Leaf Litter
Improves the Leaf Litter block to behave similarly to snow layers where its height increases as more segments are added providing lots of added depth!

![Leaf Litter Against A Log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/648996e8c6139a2fff1ea29a3782491c6d8edf38.jpeg)
![Leaf Litter In a Flower Bed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f97a6285151cdcb112fc6c31c3b08ce901eefc1.jpeg)
